description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the default docker image with a docker:dind service, defining the stages build and package. In the build stage add a maven-build job that uses the maven:3.5-jdk-8 image, runs mvn clean package, and saves the target/*.jar files as artifacts. In the package stage add a docker-build job that runs only on the master branch, executes docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE ., docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE. Also add a docker-build-dev job that runs only on the dev branch, builds the image with tag :dev using docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:dev ., logs in with the same credentials, and pushes $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:dev.
